name: Auth Full
description: Complete authentication flow with login, register, forgot password, reset password, email verification, and MFA setup/verify.

page_briefs.login: Centered card on a clean background. Email and password fields, primary sign-in button, OAuth provider row, and links to register and forgot-password.
page_briefs.register: Centered card with name, email, password fields and strength meter. Terms checkbox, register button, and link back to login.
page_briefs.forgot-password: Minimal centered card with email field and submit button. Brief instructional text above explaining the password reset email process.
page_briefs.reset-password: Centered card with new password and confirm password fields, strength indicator, and save button. Token-authenticated view reached from email link.
page_briefs.verify-email: Centered status card showing a verification message with animated checkmark on success or a resend-link button if pending.
page_briefs.mfa-setup: Centered card with QR code display for authenticator app, manual key fallback, and a 6-digit code input to confirm setup.
page_briefs.mfa-verify: Minimal centered card with a 6-digit code input, verify button, and a link to use backup codes as an alternative.
page_briefs.phone-verify: Centered card with phone number display, 6-digit SMS code input field, verify button, and resend code link.

directives: Use `d-shell[data-layout="centered"]` + `d-shell-centered-card` for all auth pages — NOT a hand-rolled centering wrapper.

Auth bypass for dev: `localStorage.decantr_authenticated = 'true'` gates protected routes. The login/register pages accept ANY credentials (no real backend) and set the flag before redirecting to the blueprint's authenticated entry route.
OAuth provider buttons MUST use real icons from lucide-react (Github, Chrome, Mail) — no inline SVGs or emoji stand-ins.
MFA code inputs render as a single `d-control` with `inputMode="numeric"` and `autoComplete="one-time-code"` + `maxLength=6`, not 6 separate digit boxes.
Error + success states use `d-annotation[data-status="error|success"]` above the form, never inline red/green text.

shells.centered: Centered card layout for focused auth forms
